candidates.why: Separate operating D&A component above EBIT, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to be part of broader operating D&A rather than specifically COGS.
Separate operating amortization row above EBIT, but not specifically tied to COGS and likely part of broader operating D&A.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of sales. No explicit D&A row in the excerpt is labelled as belonging to cost of sales/COGS or shown as a separate COGS-level add-on. The visible D&A rows are general operating rows, so adding them to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A row above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it appears to be enterprise-wide operating depreciation rather than clearly SG&A-only.
Separate operating amortization row above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but not clearly attributable only to SG&A/R&D.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the sum of Staff costs, External Expenses, Research and Development Expense, and Share-Based Compensation. Although D&A appears separately above EBIT, the visible rows are general operating D&A and are not identified as SG&A/admin/R&D-only; using them for XSGA_DA would likely capture COGS-related D&A as well. Also, no separate R&D amount is visible in the excerpt, so there is no explicit R&D amortization row to add under the special rule.
